use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and dialogs
Navigation triggers and links within application interfaces
Action buttons in card components and data displays
Icon-only buttons for toolbar and header actions
Destructive action buttons for delete and remove operations
ai_summary: A reusable atomic button component built on Radix UI Slot for composition, featuring type-safe variant styling via CVA. Supports 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes shadow effects, focus outlines, and disabled states with smooth transitions for professional application interfaces.
